documentation.file_docstring: Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) re-ranking algorithm. MMR balances relevance with diversity by iteratively selecting results that maximize: λ * relevance - (1-λ) * max_similarity_to_selected @see Carbonell & Goldstein, "The Use of MMR, Diversity-Based Reranking" (1998)
inline_comments: Tokenize text for Jaccard similarity computation. Extracts alphanumeric tokens and normalizes to lowercase.
Compute Jaccard similarity between two token sets. Returns a value in [0, 1] where 1 means identical sets.
Compute text similarity between two content strings using Jaccard on tokens.
Compute the maximum similarity between an item and all selected items.
Compute MMR score for a candidate item. MMR = λ * relevance - (1-λ) * max_similarity_to_selected

Re-rank items using Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR). The algorithm iteratively selects items that balance relevance with diversity: 1. Start with the highest-scoring item 2. For each remaining slot, select the item that maximizes the MMR score 3. MMR score = λ * relevance - (1-λ) * max_similarity_to_already_selected @param items - Items to re-rank, must have score and content @param config - MMR configuration (lambda, enabled) @returns Re-ranked items in MMR order
If lambda is 1, just return sorted by relevance (no diversity penalty)
Normalize scores to [0, 1] for fair comparison with similarity
Use original score as tiebreaker (higher is better)
Should never happen, but safety exit
Apply MMR re-ranking to hybrid search results. Adapts the generic MMR function to work with the hybrid search result format.
Create a map from ID to original item for type-safe retrieval
Create MMR items with unique IDs
Map back to original items using the ID

functions.name: tokenize
functions.doc: Tokenize text for Jaccard similarity computation.   Extracts alphanumeric tokens and normalizes to lowercase.

functions.name: jaccardSimilarity
functions.doc: Compute Jaccard similarity between two token sets.   Returns a value in [0, 1] where 1 means identical sets.

functions.name: textSimilarity
functions.doc: Compute text similarity between two content strings using Jaccard on tokens.

functions.name: maxSimilarityToSelected
functions.doc: Compute the maximum similarity between an item and all selected items.

functions.name: computeMMRScore
functions.doc: Compute MMR score for a candidate item.   MMR = λ  relevance - (1-λ)  max_similarity_to_selected

functions.name: mmrRerank
functions.doc: Re-rank items using Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR).     The algorithm iteratively selects items that balance relevance
